# FFERR_EFFECTPLAYING | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Force Feedback ](/documentation/forcefeedback)

- [ FFERR_EFFECTPLAYING ](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_effectplaying)

-  FFERR_EFFECTPLAYING 

Global Variable# FFERR_EFFECTPLAYING

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFERR_EFFECTPLAYING: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_effectplaying#Discussion)

An attempt was made to modify parameters of an effect while it is playing. Not all hardware devices support altering the parameters of an effect while it is playing.
